title: selago heterotricha
intro: Selago heterotricha, also known as Cape periwinkle or Blue Forget-me-not, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selago heterotricha include its potential to improve cognitive function, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their effects.
